user.title: Solar Catch setup
user.description: Select the excess-power sensor and the appliance switch, then set the basic control values.

data_description.power_entity: Must read positive when exporting/excess power is available, and negative when importing. Create an inverted template sensor if your meter is the opposite sign.
data_description.appliance_power_entity: Optional live power draw sensor for the controlled appliance. If supplied, Solar Catch uses this instead of the fixed fallback draw while the appliance is on.
data_description.appliance_power_w: Used only when no live appliance power sensor is selected, or if that sensor is unavailable.

init.title: Solar Catch options
init.description: Update the Solar Catch controller settings.

data_description.power_entity: Must read positive when exporting/excess power is available, and negative when importing. Create an inverted template sensor if your meter is the opposite sign.
data_description.appliance_power_entity: Optional live power draw sensor for the controlled appliance. If supplied, Solar Catch uses this instead of the fixed fallback draw while the appliance is on.
data_description.appliance_power_w: Used only when no live appliance power sensor is selected, or if that sensor is unavailable.
